zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线偏空震荡下行
zh.content:
从当前价格表现看，ADA/USD报0.160338，24小时跌幅0.59%，整体维持弱势整理格局。价格运行于20日均线0.164180下方，显示中短期趋势仍由空头主导，市场买盘动力不足，短线存在继续试探低位支撑的可能。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为-0.001698，处于零轴下方，表明市场动能偏空，空方仍占据主动。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合均线压制与MACD表现来看，多头尚未形成有效反攻信号，趋势反转依据不足。

关键位置上，短线支撑关注0.160000附近，若失守则可能进一步下探0.158000区域。上方阻力首先位于日内高点0.161264，其后为20日均线所在的0.164180附近。只有重新站稳均线压制区，市场情绪才有望逐步改善。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，优先关注支撑位得失情况。激进交易者可等待价格突破0.161300后顺势跟进，目标看向0.164000区域；若跌破0.160000，则应防范空头加速风险，严格设置止损并控制仓位规模。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is trading near 0.1603, remaining under short-term pressure after slipping 0.59% over the last 24 hours. Price action is hovering closer to the session low of 0.159981 than the daily high, suggesting sellers still maintain modest control. The market also remains below the 20-day moving average at 0.1642, reinforcing a mildly bearish short-term structure unless buyers regain momentum above that level.

Technical indicators point to restrained downside momentum rather than aggressive selling. The MACD reading at -0.0017 reflects bearish pressure, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI data is unavailable, reducing visibility into whether ADA is approaching oversold conditions. Still, trading beneath the SMA(20) implies sentiment remains cautious, with upside attempts likely facing resistance in the near term.

Immediate support appears near the daily low around 0.1600, a level that could attract short-term buying interest if defended successfully. A breakdown below this area may expose ADA to further weakness toward the psychological 0.1580 zone. On the upside, resistance is visible near 0.1613, followed by the more significant barrier around the SMA(20) at 0.1642, where stronger selling pressure may emerge.

For traders, patience may be preferable while the asset consolidates inside a narrow range. Conservative participants could wait for a sustained move above 0.1642 to confirm improving momentum before considering bullish exposure. More aggressive short-term traders may watch support near 0.1600 for bounce opportunities, but tight risk management is important given the current weak momentum profile and lack of strong bullish confirmation.
